'''langulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:squaresail|squaresail]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-ng-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:squaresail|squaresail]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| langulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:længilith|længilith]] || [[word:længilij|længilij]] || [[word:længilish|længilish]] || [[word:længili|længili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:langunguluth|langunguluth]] || [[word:langunguluj|langunguluj]] || [[word:langungulush|langungulush]] || [[word:langungulu|langungulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:languluth|languluth]] || [[word:languluj|languluj]] || [[word:langulush|langulush]] || [[word:langulu|langulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:langufluth|langufluth]] || [[word:langufluj|langufluj]] || [[word:languflush|languflush]] || [[word:langufluf|langufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:languluthu|languluthu]] || [[word:languluju|languluju]] || [[word:langulushu|langulushu]] || [[word:languluku|languluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:languluth|languluth]] || [[word:languluj|languluj]] || [[word:langulush|langulush]] || [[word:langulu|langulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:languluthul|languluthul]] || [[word:langulujul|langulujul]] || [[word:langulushul|langulushul]] || [[word:langulukul|langulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:languluthuthu|languluthuthu]] || [[word:langulujuju|langulujuju]] || [[word:langulushushu|langulushushu]] || [[word:languluku|languluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:languluthun|languluthun]] || [[word:langulujun|langulujun]] || [[word:langulushun|langulushun]] || [[word:langulukun|langulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:languluthuoro|languluthuoro]] || [[word:langulujuoro|langulujuoro]] || [[word:langulushuoro|langulushuoro]] || [[word:langulukuoro|langulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
